requirements.task_name: Book the cheapest 60-minute running technique consultation after 5:00 pm next Tuesday
requirements.task_description: Find 1:1 running technique consultations, filter for 60-minute sessions available next Tuesday after 5:00 pm, sort by price, and book the cheapest available slot for one person.

requirements.task_name: Purchase the highest-rated 4-week stress management program under $120
requirements.task_description: Find online wellbeing programs focused on stress management, filter for 4-week programs under $120 with rating at least 4.5 stars, and add the highest-rated one to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Book two non-overlapping moderate-intensity morning group classes on the same day
requirements.task_description: Find group fitness classes for an upcoming Saturday, filter for moderate intensity and durations under 45 minutes in the morning, and book two different classes whose start times are at least 30 minutes apart.

requirements.task_name: Create a weekly training plan using 3 workout templates with specific duration and type criteria
requirements.task_description: Use the training planner to add three different workout templates to a weekly plan: a cardio session under 30 minutes on Monday, a strength session between 30–45 minutes on Wednesday, and a mobility or stretching session of at least 20 minutes on Friday, then save the plan.

requirements.task_name: Add the best-value nutrition coaching bundle under $250 to cart based on total minutes
requirements.task_description: Find nutrition coaching bundles under $250, sort by price, compare the two cheapest options, choose the bundle that offers more total coaching minutes, and add it to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Join a free 7-day wellbeing email challenge starting next Monday at 8:00 am with selected themes
requirements.task_description: Locate the free 7-day wellbeing challenge, set the start date to next Monday and daily email time to 8:00 am, choose both 'Sleep' and 'Mindfulness' as themes, and submit the sign-up form.

requirements.task_name: Save three short wellbeing articles from different topics to your reading list
requirements.task_description: Use the resources section to find and save three articles to a reading list: one about injury prevention for runners, one about mental resilience, and one about nutrition, each with an estimated reading time under 10 minutes.

requirements.task_name: Build a monthly gym + yoga subscription with a combined cost under $180
requirements.task_description: Choose a monthly gym access membership and a weekly yoga class add-on so that the total monthly cost displayed in the cart is below $180, adjusting the yoga option if necessary before proceeding to checkout.
